Class GLSubCanvas

java.lang.Object
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.graphics.impl.gl.GLRenderCanvas
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.graphics.impl.gl.GLSubCanvas
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, RenderCanvasExt, RenderCanvas, NonThrowingAutoCloseable
public class GLSubCanvas extends GLRenderCanvas
An OpenGL sub-canvas.

  • Constructor Details

    • GLSubCanvas

      public GLSubCanvas(GLRenderCanvas parentCanvas)

  • Method Details

    • isSubCanvas

      public boolean isSubCanvas()
      Description copied from interface: RenderCanvas
      Checks whether this canvas is a sub-canvas. If true, then RenderCanvas.submitImage(double, double, double, double) can be safely called.
      Returns:
      true for sub-canvases, false for the main canvas

    • submitImage

      public void submitImage(double x, double y, double w, double h)
      Description copied from interface: RenderCanvas
      Draws the final rendered image on the parent canvas as described in drawImage(), if this canvas is a sub-canvas.
      Parameters:
      x - the X coordinate of the top-left corner
      y - the Y coordinate of the top-left corner
      w - the preferred width of the image or RenderCanvas.ORIGINAL_SIZE
      h - the preferred height of the image or RenderCanvas.ORIGINAL_SIZE
      See Also:
      • RenderCanvas.isSubCanvas()

    • ensureBufferBound

      protected void ensureBufferBound(boolean draw)
      Overrides:
      ensureBufferBound in class GLRenderCanvas
